title: Dashboard
subtitle: A calm view of today's worship progress.
errorDescription: There was a problem fetching your data.
goalReady: Keep today's worship close and simple.
remainingSummary: {{count}} items left. Finish them from Today's Worship.
emptyTitle: You're ready to begin today's journey.
emptyDescription: Start with one small act of worship and let the day build from there.

ONBOARDING_INCOMPLETE.title: Your setup is almost ready
ONBOARDING_INCOMPLETE.description: Your account still needs region setup before today's worship can be prepared.

NO_ACTIVE_WORSHIP_LEVEL.title: No active worship level
NO_ACTIVE_WORSHIP_LEVEL.description: Your account does not have an active worship level yet. Please contact your mentor or administrator.

NO_LEVEL_REQUIREMENTS.title: No requirements configured
NO_LEVEL_REQUIREMENTS.description: Your current worship level does not have requirements configured yet.

NO_WORSHIP_ITEMS_CONFIGURED.title: No worship items available
NO_WORSHIP_ITEMS_CONFIGURED.description: The requirements for your level do not currently point to active worship items.

excellent.title: Strong day
excellent.description: You are close to a complete day. Keep the same rhythm and finish gently.

steady.title: Good progress
steady.description: Your day is moving well. Pick one remaining item and keep the momentum.

start.title: Start small
start.description: Begin with the easiest worship item. A small start makes the rest lighter.

empty.title: Ready when you are
empty.description: Your worship list is prepared. Open tracking when the day begins.

missions.title: Missions
missions.pendingHint: {{count}} mission awaits completion and bonus XP.
